_comment: Convergence Saga roster (SS-6). Starting lines are WAVES of mid-to-late-1800s immigration to America (kind:wave) — each by arrivalYears + arrivalClass + push; they converge in America and stratify on the DESTINATION grounds (kind:destination). sensoryCue drives the diegetic birth cue; defaultCulture is the onomastics lane; eraContentDir is the era-tree content dir; validEras cross-ref eras/index.json. Validated by places.unit.test.ts + content.ts cross-resolution. South Africa (1990s wave) + the colonial deep-line are dropped; baghdad is re-founded as the 1880s Arab/Levantine wave.

places.label: Ireland
places.sensoryCue: fish and salt air, and a hard grey rain off the water
places.push: the Great Famine — starvation and eviction

places.label: Bavaria
places.sensoryCue: woodsmoke, cold mountain wind, and the smell of fermenting hops
places.push: the failed 1848 revolutions — exile and opportunity

places.label: Southern Italy
places.sensoryCue: olive dust, harbor diesel, and the noise of a crowded steerage deck

places.label: The Pale of Settlement
places.sensoryCue: lamp-oil, old books, and the cold off the shtetl road
places.push: the pogroms of the Russian Empire

places.label: Scandinavia
places.sensoryCue: pine tar, cold clean air, and snow-light off a frozen field
places.push: no land left to inherit — the homestead dream

places.label: Guangdong
places.sensoryCue: river silt, dried fish, and the clamor of the Canton waterfront
places.push: the Taiping war and famine — Gold Mountain and the rails

places.label: the Levant
places.sensoryCue: desert heat and distant shouts from a market stall on the Tigris
places.push: the decline of the Ottoman Empire — the peddler's road

places.label: the East Coast
places.sensoryCue: coal smoke, harbor brine, and the clamor of a port city

places.label: the American Midwest
places.sensoryCue: turned earth, grain dust, and a wind that crosses a thousand miles of prairie

places.label: the American South
places.sensoryCue: humid heat, magnolia, and the slow cadence of a river delta

places.label: the West Coast
places.sensoryCue: orange light, ocean fog, and the rattle of prospectors' pans
